subcodes.first_line: O thou noble and distinguished one! I have perused the contents of thy gracious letter and thy eloquent message [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الکامل الجلیل قد اطلعت بمضمون کتابکم الکریم و خطابکم البلیغ و فی صدر
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
